docket_entries.description: COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER LEE, SUSANNA HUEI-YUAN
COPYING FEES (3 PAGE, 3 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SUSANNA HUEI-YUAN
PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME, RESIDENCY VERIFIED, FILED BY PETITIONER LEE, SUSANNA HUEI-YUAN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-02-2016 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER SUSANNA LEE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
PROOF OF PUBLICATION (SAN FRANCISCO DAILY JOURNAL) OR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2016, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR - GRANTED PER WRITTEN DECREE. HEARING NOT REQUIRED. PROOF OF PUBLICATION IN THE CASE FILE. IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT ALL THE CONTENTIONS IN THE PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME ARE TRUE AND CORRECT, AND THAT THE PETITION SHOULD BE GRANTED. THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO CHANGE HER NAME FROM SUSANNA HUEI-YUAN LEE TO ANNA LEE YAN. DECREE CHANGING NAME IS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: MEREDITH GRIER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D514).
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER LEE, SUSANNA HUEI-YUAN HEARING SET FOR MAY-03-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514
DECREE CHANGING NAME FILED BY PETITIONER LEE, SUSANNA HUEI-YUAN

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER LEE, SUSANNA HUEI-YUAN HEARING SET FOR MAR-02-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
